name: HYDRA
description: 402-native paid work engine for agents and developers. Web extraction, search, regulatory intelligence, prediction market signals, and oracle data. Pay-per-call in USDC on Base L2.

endpoints.description: Active regulatory prediction markets across Polymarket and Kalshi
Micro regulatory event feed matched to prediction markets
Classified regulatory events from SEC, CFTC, Fed, FinCEN
Scored regulatory signal for one prediction market
Bulk scored signals for all regulatory prediction markets
Premium alpha report with edge analysis, Kelly sizing, trade verdict
Pre-FOMC signal with rate probabilities and Fed speech analysis
Real-time FOMC decision classification within 30 seconds of release
FOMC resolution verdict for UMA/Kalshi/Polymarket oracle submission
UMA Optimistic Oracle assertion data with evidence chain
Chainlink External Adapter response format
Professional resolution verdict for prediction market settlement
Full regulatory risk scan against all applicable frameworks
Recent regulatory changes classified by agency and impact
Jurisdiction comparison with compliance cost modeling
Regulatory Q&A with statutory citations
Web scrape — URL to clean structured text
Token price lookup with 24h change and market cap
RSS/Atom feed to structured JSON
Wallet ETH and USDC balance on Base L2
Base L2 gas prices with estimated costs for transfers, swaps, mints
Transaction receipt lookup — status, gas used, block number
Batch up to 5 utility calls in one request — saves gas vs individual payments
Structured web extraction — title, headings, clean text, links, OpenGraph metadata
Batch extraction from up to 5 URLs in parallel
Web search with structured result extraction — titles, snippets, URLs
